description: From the manufacturer Aargee Novelties which had been specialising in the distribution of incense sticks since 1979, created the Stamford brand of incense in 2004. The popularity of Stamford grew rapidly, taking Stamford to be favourite the U.K.’s incense brand, which then led to the launch of Stamford London Ltd. In 2017. Stamford London Ltd. have continued to build on the strong foundation it had the honour of inheriting and specialising in the U.K., by soling dealing with only incense, thereby ensuring that its focus is not diluted. Stamford incense is hand made in India, using traditional techniques and timeless recipes handed down through the generations. Within the Stamford brand, we have a number of unique fragrances using a variety of ﬂoral, herbal, oriental, woody and fruity undertones. We use the purest and highest quality ingredients to ensure our incense is gentle, clean-burning and eﬀortlessly releases its rich fragrance. STAMFORD HEX RANGES Floral Stamford Floral Incense Sticks let you create the perfect mood for relaxation, entertaining and a truly stylish home. With every scent from Aloe Vera to White Musk, Stamford has something perfect for everyone. Aromatherapy Stamford Aromatherapy Incense Sticks will allow you to sit back, relax, mediate or refresh your mind and enjoy the subtlety of these fragrances and aromas as you let the incense infuse the air around you. Exotic Stamford Exotic Incense Sticks will allow you to sit back, relax and enjoy the subtle aromas of herbs and citrus flavours that these incense infuse in the air around you. Spirits, Angel, Mystic & Mythical Stamford Spirits, Angel, Mystic & Mythical Incense Sticks aroma will take you serenely to a magical far off land. These incense sticks are part of large range Angelic and Mystical fragrances to really enhance your deep senses. STAMFORD MASALA RANGES Masala Stamford Masala Incense Sticks are specially formulated to get the best aromatic fragrance that are hand rolled in India from pure extracts and fine scented oils. This range made up of unique fragrances that spam from woody Sandalwood to Floral Rose Garden. Exotic Stamford Exotic Masala Incense Sticks will allow you sit and immerse yourself into intense scents that will flow through your entire home. This range has fragrances that will take your senses to a more earthy and citrus element. Traditional Stamford Traditional Masala Incense Sticks are all time favourites and used for all types of spiritual and religious occasions. This range has flavours starting from Chandan, Loban and Gugal. STAMFORD CONE RANGES Floral Stamford Floral Incense Cones let you create the perfect mood for relaxation, entertaining and a truly stylish home. With every scent from Aloe Vera to White Musk, Stamford has something perfect for everyone. Exotic & Aromatherapy Stamford Exotic & Aromatherapy Incense Cones are a combination of exquisite and calming scents that will invigorate your senses and bring life to any home. Ranging from Frankincense to Mediation, there is always a cone for any feeling. Mythical & Angel Stamford Mythical & Angel Incense Cones transport you scenes of a land of mystery and calm with this unique blend of hot perfumes to infuse the air around you. This range is truly mythical with ranges such as Dragon's Fire and taking you all the way the sky with Guardian Angel. Backflow Stamford Backflow Incense Cones allow smoke to cascade downwards as these incense cones have a hole through their centres and the special backflow burners have reservoirs for the smoke to flow through. These cones are available in our most popular ranges.
